problem: Why does quantum superposition collapse — can decoherence be prevented at scale?
mechanism: Electromagnetic induction in moving biological tissue
hypothesis: Why does quantum superposition collapse — can decoherence be prevented at scale? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Electromagnetic. Electromagnetic induction in moving biological tissue directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Bench-top proof of concept with 7 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
